McDowell in 2008.

English actor [Malcolm McDowell](/wiki/Malcolm_McDowell "Malcolm McDowell") made his screen debut as [Mick Travis](/wiki/Mick_Travis "Mick Travis") in the 1968 satire *[If....](/wiki/If.... "If....")* and came to international prominence three years later with his portrayal of [Alex DeLarge](/wiki/Alex_(A_Clockwork_Orange) "Alex (A Clockwork Orange)") in *[A Clockwork Orange](/wiki/A_Clockwork_Orange_(film) "A Clockwork Orange (film)")* (1971). His subsequent credits include: *[The Raging Moon](/wiki/The_Raging_Moon "The Raging Moon")* (1971), *[O Lucky Man!](/wiki/O_Lucky_Man! "O Lucky Man!")* (1973), *[Voyage of the Damned](/wiki/Voyage_of_the_Damned "Voyage of the Damned")* (1976), *[Time After Time](/wiki/Time_After_Time_(1979_film) "Time After Time (1979 film)")* (1979), *[Caligula](/wiki/Caligula_(film) "Caligula (film)")* (1979), *[Cat People](/wiki/Cat_People_(1982_film) "Cat People (1982 film)")* (1982), *[Blue Thunder](/wiki/Blue_Thunder "Blue Thunder")* (1983), *[The Caller](/wiki/The_Caller_(1987_film) "The Caller (1987 film)")* (1987), *[Star Trek Generations](/wiki/Star_Trek_Generations "Star Trek Generations")* (1994), *[Tank Girl](/wiki/Tank_Girl_(film) "Tank Girl (film)")* (1995), *[Mr. Magoo](/wiki/Mr._Magoo_(film) "Mr. Magoo (film)")* (1997), *[Gangster No. 1](/wiki/Gangster_No._1 "Gangster No. 1")* (2000), *[I Spy](/wiki/I_Spy_(2002_film) "I Spy (2002 film)")* (2002), *[I'll Sleep When I'm Dead](/wiki/I%27ll_Sleep_When_I%27m_Dead_(2003_film) "I'll Sleep When I'm Dead (2003 film)")* (2003), *[The Company](/wiki/The_Company_(film) "The Company (film)")* (2003), *[Doomsday](/wiki/Doomsday_(2008_film) "Doomsday (2008 film)")* (2008), *[Easy A](/wiki/Easy_A "Easy A")* (2010), *[The Artist](/wiki/The_Artist_(film) "The Artist (film)")* (2011) and *[Bombshell](/wiki/Bombshell_(2019_film) "Bombshell (2019 film)")* (2019). He also played Dr. [Samuel Loomis](/wiki/Samuel_Loomis "Samuel Loomis") in the 2007 remake of *[Halloween](/wiki/Halloween_(2007_film) "Halloween (2007 film)")* and its sequel, *[Halloween II](/wiki/Halloween_II_(2009_film) "Halloween II (2009 film)")* (2009).

Outside film, McDowell has appeared in recurring roles on *[Entourage](/wiki/Entourage_(American_TV_series) "Entourage (American TV series)")* (2005–2011) and *[Heroes](/wiki/Heroes_(American_TV_series) "Heroes (American TV series)")* (2006–2007), and had starring roles on *[Franklin & Bash](/wiki/Franklin_%26_Bash "Franklin & Bash")* (2011–2014) and *[Mozart in the Jungle](/wiki/Mozart_in_the_Jungle "Mozart in the Jungle")* (2014–2018). He has played Patrick "Pop" Critch on the Canadian series *[Son of a Critch](/wiki/Son_of_a_Critch "Son of a Critch")* since 2022. He has also voiced characters in various animated shows, films and video games, such as *[Superman: The Animated Series](/wiki/Superman:_The_Animated_Series "Superman: The Animated Series")* (1996–1999), *[Metalocalypse](/wiki/Metalocalypse "Metalocalypse")* (2007–2012), *[Bolt](/wiki/Bolt_(2008_film) "Bolt (2008 film)")* (2008), *[Fallout 3](/wiki/Fallout_3 "Fallout 3")* (2008), *[The Elder Scrolls](/wiki/The_Elder_Scrolls "The Elder Scrolls")* franchise (2014–2021), and *[Call of Duty: Black Ops III](/wiki/Call_of_Duty:_Black_Ops_III "Call of Duty: Black Ops III")* (2016).
